ddls:
CREATE TABLE "health_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health statistic record */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* 95% lower bound of life expectancy */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* 95% upper bound of life expectancy */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Estimated life expectancy at birth */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority */,
  "old_ward_code" TEXT /* Old ward code for historical data */,
  "ward_code" TEXT /* Current ward code */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the data range */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender to which the statistic applies */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the data range */,
  "source_data_url" TEXT /* URL to the source data for transparency and verification */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Population size for the ward and gender combination */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity breakdown for health disparity analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_local_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_authority_id") REFERENCES local_authorities ("local_authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_statistics_ward_code FOREIGN KEY ("ward_code") REFERENCES wards ("ward_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_authorities" (
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the local authority */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the local authority operates */,
  "authority_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the local authority */,
  "authority_website" TEXT /* URL to the local authority's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "local_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the local authority that the ward belongs to */,
  "ward_population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "ward_area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a dataset */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health statistic record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changes_summary" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health statistic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES health_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_file_url" TEXT /* URL to the generated report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
